product.highlights:
Mikief Collections - Imperial White Collections


White is a color of Purity and Elegance. Imperial White Collections' design with a gold trim couldn't be more perfect to bring a sense of luxury on to your dining table. 

Be it a collection for yourself to plate the lovely warm meals for your family or a housewarming gift for your close friends, Imperial White Collections will be a hard to miss choice. 

Product Dimensions
Spoon - L14cm x W4.5cm
Saucer - L8.9cm x W8.9cm x H2.5cm
4.5 inch Rice Bowl - L11.3cm x W11.3cm x H6.1cm
7 inch Soup Bowl - L19cm x W19cm x H7.5cm
8 inch Soup Bowl - L20cm x W20cm x H6.5cm
7.5 inch Dish Plate - L18.8cm x W18.8cm x H2.5cm
8 inch Rice Plate - L20cm x W20cm x H2.4cm
10 inch Dinner Plate - L25.5cm x W25.5cm x H3.7cm
7.5 inch Coupe Plate - L18.2cm x W18.2cm x H4cm
8 inch Coupe Plate - L20cm x W20cm x H4.5cm
9 inch Coupe Plate - L22.5cm x W22.5cm x H5cm

Reminder
These are made of ceramic thus fragile. Kindly handle them with care.
Due to manufacturing process, some may have little black dots, uneven surface. These are deem as normal as they do not affect the overall visual and usage of the dinnerware. 

DO NOT use them in Microwave!
